verdicts.evidence: diacritic is a handakuten ring (single top pixel then splits), unlike the dakuten two-strokes of ヴ(342); スペースノイド needs ペ
handakuten ring diacritic (not dakuten); アポリー (Apolly) requires ポ
glyph is full-size (ink h36 vs neighbor h33); ない/するヤツ demand large ヤ (small ャ can't follow い/る)
